smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 3 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few thundery showers later. Force 3 to 4 west to northwesterly winds, becoming force 5 southwesterly winds with gusts.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. One or two showers later. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
